overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a vibrant neon-lit commercial district, turning into a narrow graffiti-covered alley, and emerging back onto a street beneath towering overpasses. The scene features a dense cyberpunk urban environment with massive digital billboards, street vendors, and a mix of bright natural sunlight and colorful neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: main commercial boulevard with neon billboards

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the center of a wide commercial street toward a crosswalk, passing pedestrians on both sides

notable_agents.action: utility truck driving across the intersection ahead

entered.detail: large neon sign with purple text reading HOTEL mounted on a dark building facade
massive curved digital screen displaying colorful advertisements on a skyscraper
broad yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the asphalt
multi-story building with green painted exterior and multiple balconies

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a wide sunlit commercial boulevard lined with towering buildings covered in massive digital billboards. A prominent purple neon HOTEL sign marks the left side while pedestrians walk in the same direction. The character approaches a broad crosswalk with yellow stripes as a utility truck passes in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with food vendors and outdoor seating

events.description: turns right from main boulevard onto a narrower sidewalk lined with food stalls and vending machines

agents.ego_description: turns right at the intersection and walks along the sidewalk past outdoor dining areas and street vendors

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red hair walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: pair of blue and yellow automated food dispensers with illuminated displays showing menu items
red plastic chairs and small tables arranged outside a restaurant entrance
storefront with bright teal paint and illuminated signage reading FREE CITY BEA
string of traditional red spherical lanterns hanging above the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character turns right onto a narrower commercial sidewalk featuring food vending machines and outdoor seating. The teal restaurant facade dominates the left side while red paper lanterns hang overhead. Pedestrians move in scattered directions as the character passes by the vending machines and approaches a stairway entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow back alley with stairs and graffiti

events.description: enters a narrow alleyway with graffiti-covered walls and begins descending concrete stairs
lighting dims significantly as the character moves deeper into the enclosed alley space

agents.ego_description: walks down a narrow stairway between tall walls, following a pedestrian with red hair who is also descending

entered.detail: concrete wall covered in red and white spray paint tags and street art
bright cyan neon arrow pointing left mounted on the alley wall
large industrial electrical boxes with warning symbols and glowing displays
descending concrete steps leading down between the narrow alley walls

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow enclosed alleyway with walls covered in graffiti and descends a concrete stairway. The lighting shifts to low light as neon signs and electrical panels become the primary light sources. Trash bags and debris line the walls as the character follows the stairway down toward the alley exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: street beneath overpass with towering billboards

events.description: exits the narrow alley back onto a street beneath a large concrete overpass
camera tilts upward to look at the towering skyscrapers and overhead billboards

agents.ego_description: walks along the sidewalk beneath the overpass, occasionally looking up at the massive buildings and billboards overhead

notable_agents.action: lone pedestrian standing near the street corner under the overpass

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass structure casting shadows over the street below
large blue neon sign with Japanese characters reading ホテル (HOTEL) and English text below
tall vertical neon sign with red Japanese characters and KARAOKE text in English
building-sized advertisement showing a figure in tactical gear with yellow text

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the alley onto a street beneath a massive concrete overpass, transitioning from enclosed darkness to a semi-covered urban canyon. Towering skyscrapers with enormous digital billboards and neon signs dominate the view as the character walks forward. The camera tilts up to admire the vertical cityscape before continuing under the overpass toward the distant street corner.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open commercial boulevard into a claustrophobic urban alleyway before emerging beneath a massive concrete overpass. It begins on a sunlit street lined with towering digital billboards and a purple neon hotel sign, moving forward across a yellow-striped crosswalk. As the character turns right, the environment shifts to a narrower sidewalk filled with food vending machines, red paper lanterns, and a teal restaurant facade. The scene then descends into a dim, enclosed alleyway where the sunlight vanishes, replaced by low-light neon signs and graffiti-covered walls lining a concrete stairway. Finally, the camera emerges from the darkness into a semi-covered urban canyon, tilting upward to reveal a vertical cityscape of skyscrapers and enormous billboards beneath the heavy shadow of the overpass.
